betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ME Storage Monitor§f:
The §6ME Storage Monitor §f(appliedenergistics2:part:400) is a §ecable part§f that §bdisplays the stored count of a specific item§f on its surface. It is a §6visual readout §f that combines a §6Level Emitter §f with an §6Illuminated Panel §f to show numbers directly on the cable.

§6Production Path (network/parts/panels_semi_dark_monitor.json)§f:
The §6ME Storage Monitor §f is built from a §6Level Emitter §f + 2 illuminated panel variants. Looking at the source recipes:
- §6ME Level Emitter §f(appliedenergistics2:part:280) — 1
- §6Illuminated Panel §f(appliedenergistics2:part:180) — 1
- §6Dark Illuminated Panel §f(appliedenergistics2:part:200) — 1
- Yields 1× ME Storage Monitor

The §6panels_semi_dark_monitor.json §frecipe gives §b3 §f Bright Illuminated Panels per craft (quartz glass + iron + redstone + glowstone pattern "ab/cdb/ab").

§6Function (PartStorageMonitor.java:31-66)§f:
- §bItem slot §f: place an item in the §6config slot §f to monitor
- §bNumeric display §f: the panel shows the §6current stored count §f of that item
- §bAuto-update §f: the display refreshes every tick based on network state
- §bRedstone§f: emits §bredstone §f equivalent to the level emitter it is built from
- §bNo config manager §f: this is a §6display-only §f part — settings are inherited from the underlying Level Emitter

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 7 items the ME Storage Monitor is a component of:
- §6ME Conversion Monitor §f (appliedenergistics2:part:420) — see §6ME Conversion Monitor §f
- §6Bright Illuminated Panel §f
- §6Illuminated Panel §f
- §6Dark Illuminated Panel §f
- §6ME Inverted Storage Monitor §f (variant)
- §6Stockroom Display §f
- §6AE2 HUD element §f

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: place a Storage Monitor on a §6ME Chest §f or §6ME Drive §fface for at-a-glance inventory checks
- §eTip§f: combine with a §6Crafting Terminal §f to see item counts next to the pattern being crafted
- §cWarning§f: the Storage Monitor displays the §braw count §fof the item, not the §6stacked-with-NBT §f variant
- §cWarning§f: if the item in the config slot is also held in a §6Spatial Storage Cell §f, the count includes both — there is no way to filter to one source
